svg.aria-label: Docker container security image scanning and non-root execution and secret management, Kubernetes Pod Security Standards restricted profile and RBAC and network policy, runtime threat detection with Falco and admission controller.
svg.title: 2026-01-15: Docker container security, Kubernetes PSS, 8th batch week 7

g.text: Trivy image vuln scan : non-root USER directive...
Base image freshness : Dockerfile lint : secret...
Pin base image to digest : hadolint Dockerfile : inject...
IRSA token : service account per workload : deny...
Enforce PSS restricted label : separate SA per deployment...
Falco syscall rules : privileged container alert...
CIS benchmark score : image policy : Falco alert SIEM...
Run kube-bench CIS : Falco alert to SIEM : deny privileged...
